key_insights.insight: Being 100% honest and transparent attracts the right community and customers.
key_insights.quote: I've always been 100% honest and transparent with who I am. You're not going to find a hidden secret or some nasty surprise. This is who I am you literally either take it or you leave it and I'm not going to try and be anything else to fit in for anybody else you know.

key_insights.insight: Judgment based on appearances or social media following is often inaccurate and says more about the person judging.
key_insights.quote: When they see a pretty young lady who's worked out on Instagram who has a big following...they tend to come to judgments very quickly...that conclusion and that narrative or that image that they form of that person I've come to learn is usually severely wrong.

key_insights.insight: True self-belief eliminates the need to seek validation from others.
key_insights.quote: It's never been about other people's perceptions of you it's always been what you think about yourself and if you truly truly believe in yourself you won't want to be anybody else you want to you won't want to be fake you wouldn't want to be trying to please everyone my job isn't to please everyone.

key_insights.insight: Discipline and consistency in one area of life, like fitness, can positively influence other areas.
key_insights.quote: When you start doing something good for yourself training was good for me right you start to build these disciplines and habits and consistencies and they transfer in other aspects of your life it's like a domino effect.

key_insights.insight: Seeking happiness in others leads to dependency and dissatisfaction in relationships.
key_insights.quote: I realized it's because I'm trying to find happiness in other people. Constantly trying to find happiness in other people. And then when I started focusing on myself, he came along.

key_insights.insight: Working with a romantic partner can be challenging due to blurred boundaries between work and personal life, potentially hindering the relationship.
key_insights.quote: Working and being romantically involved with someone is difficult...When you come home from work, you're coming home from work with the same person. What do you think you're going to speak about when you get home? Work.

key_insights.insight: Having a 'sustainable why' for fitness is key to making long-term lifestyle changes, instead of focusing on short term goals like events.
key_insights.quote: I teach you how to gain a sustainable why which is fundamentally the most important foundation you need for fitness.

key_insights.insight: It's okay to be in touch with virtual community, but should be recognized it's different than real relationships.
key_insights.quote: I've pretty much built a virtual community, right? And I feel like that's my team. Even though I may have not met these women physically, I feel like they get me more than the people in my own life.

actionable_advice.advice: Prioritize self-care and personal well-being, even when deeply immersed in career.
actionable_advice.how_to: Schedule dedicated time for activities unrelated to work, such as hobbies, travel, or spending time with loved ones. Actively resist the urge to work during these times and be fully present in the moment.

actionable_advice.advice: Identify and challenge limiting beliefs that may hinder personal growth.
actionable_advice.how_to: Reflect on recurring negative thoughts or self-criticism and question their validity. Replace these with more positive and empowering beliefs that support your goals and self-worth.
Instead of working towards an event like a vacation or a wedding, focus on a holistic why rooted in the need to live and improve self-esteem.

memorable_stories: Chrissy's story of being bullied for having a mustache in school and eating lunch in the toilet.
Chrissy's family immigrating at the back of a banana lorry and being separated at a prison in France.
The story of Tone and Sculpt app crashing and losing thousands of subscribers in a day while Chrissy was also going through a breakup.
Holly's mom, Chrissy's best friend, took her in when she was homeless and provided unwavering support with no expectation or reminders, which made impact at the end of her life.
contrarian_claims: Traditional career goals like financial status or awards are not always attainable and do not guarantee fulfillment.
Fitness should not have a status quo, and should represent how it makes a person feel mentally and physically.
It is okay to take the bag even if you know an organization offering it is only doing so for superficial diversity.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - How She Built Her Confidence, and Then an Empire with Krissy Cela
